title: vicia ochroleuca
intro: Vicia ochroleuca, also known as pale yellow vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Vicia ochroleuca can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or extracts.
